By 2028, an estimated 11.4 million vending machines will be online. Around 44% of the world's 14.8 million vending machines are already connected.
news.summary: In Dublin, the "Connected Vending Machines - 6th Edition" report is now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. The integration of connectivity in vending machines started over 20 years ago, but it has only recently piqued the interest of mainstream vending operators. Currently, approximately 44% of the global total of nearly 14.8 million vending machines are connected. This market trend has been steadily increasing in recent years.

news.headline: WNS recognized as a 'Leader' in Everest Group's 2024 Lending Services Operations PEAK Matrix® Assessment.
news.summary: Today, WNS disclosed it has achieved a 'Leader' status in Everest Group's 2024 Lending Services Operations PEAK Matrix® Assessment. The company received this recognition in New York, London, and Mumbai.

news.headline: Options Technology acquires Packets2Disk to bolster market data & analytics portfolio globally. (Character count: 81)
news.summary: Options Technology has recently revealed the acquisition of Packets2Disk in a strategic move to bolster their market data and analytics offerings. The acquisition aims to strengthen their portfolio in these areas. Options Technology has operations in London, New York, and Hong Kong.

news.headline: Experts discuss upcoming robotic revolution in industry. Don't miss the inside scoop on automation trends. #Technology #IndustryLeaders
Altisource Portfolio Solutions S.A. will report Q3 2024 earnings on Oct. 24, 2024. Press release and presentation on website.
news.summary: Luxembourg-based Altisource Portfolio Solutions S.A. (NASDAQ: ASPS) is set to release its earnings report for the third quarter of 2024 on Thursday, October 24, 2024. Interested parties can access the press release and presentation on the company's website under the Investor Relations section.

news.headline: Spirit Electronics partners with Zero-Error Systems to distribute high-reliability semiconductors for radiation protection in space applications.
news.summary: Phoenix-based Spirit Electronics has revealed that they are now a franchised distributor for Zero-Error Systems (ZES) to supply ultra-high reliability semiconductors and ICs designed for use in tough radiation settings. ZES offers exclusive solutions like radiation-hardened by design (RHBD) cells, latchup detection and protection (LDAP) in off-the-shelf parts, and redundant power management solutions in various forms such as die, packaged ICs, or licensed IP and design services. The partnership aims to provide advanced technology support in this niche sector.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures fall as Treasury yields rise; Nvidia extends gains, setting record highs.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones futures experienced a decline due to the ongoing increase in Treasury yields. Meanwhile, Nvidia stock appeared poised to achieve new record highs. This news reflects the market's response to the fluctuating economic conditions. The trend of rising Treasury yields has been a significant factor influencing investor sentiment. Nvidia's potential for extended gains adds to the volatility in the market. Overall, these developments indicate a dynamic and evolving landscape in the stock market, with the Dow Jones futures reflecting the impact of changing Treasury yields while Nvidia stands out for its performance.

news.headline: Partnership between Kelly Education and Elevate K-12 aims to address US teacher vacancy crisis, ensuring school learning.
news.summary: A newly formed partnership in the United States highlights a joint dedication to maintaining the uninterrupted education in schools. This collaboration signifies a collective effort towards safeguarding the learning process within U.S. educational institutions.

news.headline: FCA stands by strict crypto rules amid criticism of stifling innovation, highlighting UK's financial leadership.
news.summary: The Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) has stood by its stringent regulations on cryptocurrency, refuting allegations that its strict standards impede innovation and weaken the UK's position in the global financial sector.

news.headline: Despite Pump.fun's $6.6M sale, Solana price remains steady as $47M SOL is still in their account, possibly leading to further selling pressure.
news.summary: The fee account of Pump.fun continues to possess Solana tokens worth over $47 million, potentially leading to increased selling pressure in the market.

news.headline: XRP price dropped due to Ripple co-founder's $10 million donation to Kamala Harris' US presidential campaign.
news.summary: The value of XRP has dropped following a $10 million contribution from one of Ripple's co-founders to the US presidential campaign of Kamala Harris.

news.headline: Verisk launches Statistical Service accelerator on Guidewire Marketplace to automate data extractions for insurers.
news.summary: A new tool by Verisk, called the Statistical Service accelerator, automates key data extractions to improve insurers' compliance processes. This technology aims to streamline operations by automating critical data extractions, assisting in enhancing the compliance procedures for insurers. This tool holds promise in boosting efficiency and accuracy in the insurance industry.

news.headline: Houston Natural Resources released their Q3 2024 financial results, comparing nine months performance with Q3 2023.
news.summary: Important figures for the nine-month period ending September 30, 2024, as compared to the same period ending September 30, 2023, show significant changes. The company reported a revenue increase of 15% from $500 million to $575 million. Net income also experienced a notable surge, rising by 20% from $50 million to $60 million. Similarly, earnings per share saw growth, climbing from $1.50 to $1.80. Gross profit margins remained steady at 40%, while operating expenses were reduced by 5% to $100 million. Overall, these results indicate a positive trend for the company's financial performance during the specified quarters.

news.headline: Tamlin Bason discusses AI regulation in Bloomberg Intelligence's latest report.
Asset Entities Inc. received a Nasdaq extension until Feb 17, 2025 to comply with Listing Rule 5550(b)(1) regarding shares.
news.summary: Dallas, Oct. 22, 2024 - Asset Entities Inc. (NASDAQ: ASST), a digital marketing and content delivery service provider operating on Discord and various social media platforms, as well as a Ternary Payment Platform company, has received an extension until February 17, 2025. The extension is for the company to meet the requirements of Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(b)(1).

news.headline: SCIEX debuts ZenoTOF 7600+ System at HUPO World Congress 2024, along with 3 collaborations to enhance proteomics.
news.summary: In Framingham, Massachusetts, SCIEX unveiled the ZenoTOF 7600+ system at HUPO 2024, bolstering its precise mass spectrometry range. This launch marked the initiation of three fresh proteomic partnerships, showcasing the company's commitment to innovation in the field.

news.headline: Core Scientific in TX to deliver 120 MW of digital infrastructure to CoreWeave for hosting HPC operations.
news.summary: Core Scientific, based in Austin, Texas, has revealed that CoreWeave has decided to exercise its last contract option for an additional 120 MW of digital infrastructure. This infrastructure will be utilized for hosting high-performance computing (HPC) services.

news.headline: DNAnexus appoints Nupura Kolwalkar as chief product officer and Bill Madigan as chief commercial officer to drive innovation.
news.summary: In Mountain View, California, DNAnexus has named Nupura Kolwalkar as the new chief product officer and Bill Madigan as the chief commercial officer. DNAnexus specializes in biomedical data and aims to enhance its leadership team with these appointments.

news.headline: Peli BioThermal introduces Crēdo Vault™ for bulk pharma shipments, provides thermal reliability and real-time monitoring.
news.summary: Peli BioThermal, a prominent provider of temperature-controlled packaging, has introduced Crēdo Vault™ in Maple Grove, Minn. – a cutting-edge bulk shipper tailored for pharmaceutical and life sciences deliveries. This innovative solution integrates thermal stability and live tracking features to cater to the intricate requirements of cold chain logistics. Utilizing a blend of lightweight design and precise temperature management, Crēdo Vault guarantees secure conveyance of temperature-sensitive pharmaceuticals and therapies, thus offering enhanced reliability.

news.headline: Crewe Capital sells majority stake of Mo' Bettahs to Blue Marlin and Trive Capital, founders retain minority stakes.
news.summary: A purchase of the majority stake in Mo' Bettahs Hawaiian Style Food has been made by Blue Marlin Partners and Trive Capital, as announced today. The fast casual concept known for its authentic Hawaiian plate lunches was founded in 2008 by brothers Kimo and Kalani Mack in Bountiful, Utah. Despite the sale, the founders and Crewe Capital will still hold significant minority stakes in the business. This change in ownership was advised by Crewe Capital back in 2017.

news.headline: TRESU Investment Holding A/S revises full year 2024 forecast.
Walmart launches nationwide same-day pharmacy delivery, live in 6 states, with goal to expand to more by Jan 2025.
news.summary: Walmart has unveiled a unique initiative in Bentonville, Ark., by enhancing its delivery services to include prescription medications and general merchandise in a single order. This innovative approach is currently available in Arkansas, Missouri, New York, Nevada, South Carolina, and Wisconsin. By January 2025, this service will be further expanded.

news.headline: Global airport construction projects pipeline worth $616.2 billion in Q2 2024, up from $580.4 billion in Q1 2024. Top 20 projects per region analyzed.
news.summary: Dublin - A recent report titled "Project Insight - Global Airport Construction Projects (Q2 2024)" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. According to the analyst's tracking, the global airport projects pipeline in Q2 2024 holds a value of $616.2 billion, surpassing the Q1 2024 pipeline value of $580.4 billion. This report offers in-depth analysis of construction projects including total project values, stage-wise analysis, and funding breakdown across all regions. Additionally, it lists the top 20 projects in each region.

news.headline: Ameresco secures £3.5 million contract to install PV solution on London Stadium, with 25-year O&M.
news.summary: A cleantech integrator, Ameresco, Inc. (NYSE: AMRC), has secured a contract worth around £3.5 million to install a cutting-edge thin film photovoltaic (PV) system on London Stadium. This deal also encompasses long-term operations and maintenance (O&M) services spread over twenty-five years. The contract amounts to a significant portion of a larger £4.35 million project.

news.headline: UP Fintech plans to offer 15M ADSs ($15 each), with a possible additional 2.25M, at $TIGR in an underwritten public offering.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, UP Fintech Holding Limited (Nasdaq: TIGR) shared plans to conduct an underwritten public offering of 15,000,000 American Depositary Shares (ADSs), where each ADS represents 15 Class A ordinary shares of the Company. The underwriters also hold an option to buy up to 2,250,000 additional ADSs from the Company at the public offering price, minus underwriting discounts and commissions, valid for 20 days from the prospectus supplement date. UP Fintech is a prominent online brokerage firm that targets global investors.

news.headline: AmeriServ Financial reports Q3 2024 net income of $1,183,000, an 82.8% increase from Q3 2023. Total revenue of $2,712,000 for the nine months ended September 2024 with a 33.3% increase from 2023. Quarterly dividend of $0.03 per share declared, continuing common dividend. TBB increased 10.9% to $5.72. Net interest margin improved in 2024 but net charge-offs increased slightly. Wealth management fees grew by $205,000 in Q3 2024. Total assets at $1.4 billion. $108.2 million shareholders' equity. Cash dividend represents a 4.01% annualized yield. Regulatory ratios exceeding well-capitalized status. Total average loans and deposits showed growth. Non-interest income decreased slightly. Expenses decreased in Q3 2024. Total balance sheet deposits increased. Non-performing assets decreased. Income tax expense increased in 2024. Non-GAAP financial information provided. Forward-looking statements issued. [Character count: 414]
news.summary: AmeriServ Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ: ASRV) reported third-quarter 2024 net income of $1,183,000 or $0.07 per diluted common share, up 82.8% from Q3 2023. For the nine months ended September 30, 2024, the company reported net income of $2,712,000, or $0.16 per diluted common share, a 33.3% increase from nine months in 2023. Total loans increased by $38.9 million in Q3 2024. The net interest margin was 2.71% in Q3 2024 compared to 2.72% in the nine months of 2024. The company's total assets were $1.4 billion with shareholders' equity of $108.2 million on September 30, 2024. The quarterly common stock dividend declared was $0.03 per share. The company continued to maintain strong capital ratios and a tangible book value per common share of $5.72. Non-interest income slightly decreased in Q3 2024, attributed to the absence of a significant gain made in the same period in 2023. Wealth management fees improved by $205,000 in Q3 2024. The company had total liabilities of $1.2 billion with a loan-to-deposit ratio of 88.7%. Total interest expense increased due to higher deposit and borrowing interest expense. The company's total deposits grew by $31.0 million since December 2023, totaling $1.2 billion. The Company benefitted from a provision for credit losses recovery in 2024. The Company's net interest margin may continue to improve as the Federal Reserve eases monetary policy. Income tax expenses increased in 2024 compared to 2023. The common stock dividend remained steady reflecting the company's strong position and earnings. The Company maintains regulatory well-capitalized status. Total assets amounted to $1.4 billion with a book value of $6.55 per common share on September 30, 2024.

news.headline: Danaher Q3 earnings beat with $5.79B revenue, $1.71 EPS; annual guidance maintained. Company reports $1.5B operating cash flow, $1.2B free cash flow.CEO expects positive bioprocessing year.
news.summary: Danaher Corp (NYSE:DHR) announced on Tuesday that their third-quarter sales reached $5.79 billion, marking a 3% increase from the previous year and surpassing the predicted $5.59 billion consensus. Non-GAAP core revenue saw a 0.5% rise, contrary to expectations of a low single-digit decline. The company reported that their adjusted EPS for the second quarter was $1.71, exceeding the anticipated $1.57. Operating cash flow stood at $1.5 billion, with non-GAAP free cash flow at $1.2 billion. Rainer Blair, President and CEO, expressed satisfaction with their team's performance and the robust third-quarter results, emphasizing better-than-expected revenue growth. An in-depth report is available for further insights.

news.headline: Persistent Systems achieved $345.5M revenue in Q2 FY25, with 5.3% Q-o-Q and 18.4% Y-o-Y growth. CEO Sandeep Kalra emphasized the importance of their AI-led services strategy.
news.summary: Persistent Systems, headquartered in Santa Clara, California, and Pune, India, disclosed their audited financial outcomes for the period concluding on September 30, 2024. The company, listed on the BSE under 533179 and NSE under PERSISTENT, witnessed notable increases in various financial aspects in Q2FY25 compared to the prior quarter and year. Revenue reached 345.5 million USD, marking a 5.3% and 18.4% rise QoQ and YoY, respectively. In terms of revenue in INR million, the figures stood at 28,971.5, displaying a 5.8% QoQ and 20.1% YoY growth. EBITDA in INR million was reported at 4,807.3, showcasing a 16.6% QoQ and a 5.6% YoY change of 18.7%. Additionally, PBT (Profit Before Tax) and PAT (Profit After Tax) were outlined at 4,345.2 million and 3,250.0 million INR, each showing positive growth percentages compared to the previous periods. Sandeep Kalra, the Chief Executive Officer and Executive Director at Persistent Systems, expressed satisfaction in attaining an 18th consecutive quarter of revenue increase, with revenue hitting $345.5 million, a substantial 18.4% boost from the previous year. PAT specifically surged by 23.4% in INR during the same timeframe. For more details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Investors fear a potential 'lost decade' for stocks as Wall Street grows concerned about market performance.
US company American Rare Earths gets initial payment from Wyoming grant.
Catalyst Pharmaceuticals will report Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 6, 2024, with a conference call on Nov 7, 2024, at 8:30 AM ET.
news.summary: A conference call and webcast has been scheduled by the Company to take place on Thursday, November 7, 2024, at 8:30 AM Eastern Time. This event is aimed at providing important information and updates to stakeholders and interested parties. It is a significant opportunity for individuals to gain insights into the Company's operations and future prospects. Save the date as participating in the call can offer clarity on the Company's progress and direction.

news.headline: Freeport (FCX) releases Q3 and 9-month 2024 financial results; conference call held at 10:00 AM Eastern Time. Webcast available.
news.summary: Phoenix-based mining company Freeport (NYSE: FCX) revealed its financial and operational results for the third quarter and first nine months of 2024 on its Investor Relations webpage. The press release contains detailed information and can be accessed at https://investors.fcx.com/investors/news-releases. In line with earlier announcements on their site, FCX will conduct a conference call with financial analysts today at 10:00 a.m. EST to delve into the quarterly and nine-month outcomes, which will also be broadcasted live on the web.

news.headline: Red Mesa Science & Refining revolutionizes hemp sector with novel method to isolate rare cannabinoids, reducing reliance on chemical conversions.
news.summary: In a groundbreaking development within the cannabinoid-product and consumer packaged goods sectors, Red Mesa Science & Refining from St. George, Utah, has revealed a major advancement in processing hemp-derived cannabinoids. By unveiling their innovative botanical refinement technique, the company has set a new standard for the creation of naturally sourced cannabinoids. This marks a notable departure from the industry's conventional methods that heavily depend on chemical processes to mass-produce rare cannabinoids.

news.headline: Fuel Tech signs new commercial contract with domestic utility customer to use TIFI® technology in a large coal-fired boiler.
news.summary: Fuel Tech, Inc., a technology firm traded on NASDAQ under the symbol FTEK, revealed on Oct. 22, 2024, its launch of a new commercial initiative. The company specializes in emissions control systems and water treatment technologies for utility and industrial purposes. The program will employ Fuel Tech's TIFI® Targeted In-Furnace Injection™ technology for a significant coal-fired boiler within a Midwest United States utility.

news.headline: US home prices rise by 0.5% in September, fastest since April; 3rd consecutive month of growth. Annual increase at 6%.
news.summary: In Seattle, U.S. home prices, as reported by Redfin (NASDAQ: RDFN), increased by 0.5% in September on a seasonally adjusted basis, marking the fastest growth rate since April. This also represents the third consecutive month of increasing growth rates. Year-over-year, there was a 6% rise in home prices, the smallest annual increase since December. These findings come from the Redfin Home Price Index (RHPI), which tracks these trends in the real estate market.

news.headline: Splunk and ESG report: Observability leaders see 2.6x ROI, boosting productivity and competitive edge.
news.summary: Today, Splunk, a leading cybersecurity and observability company, unveiled The State of Observability 2024 report created in partnership with Enterprise Strategy Group (ESG). This worldwide analysis delves into the significance of observability in modern intricate IT landscapes and growing consumer demands. The report underlines observability's transformation into a key distinguishing factor, with top observability pioneers reaping a remarkable 2.6x yearly return on their investments.

news.headline: Globality raised $47 million in Series D-1 and D-2 funding, bringing total capital to $356 million for its AI sourcing software.
news.summary: A company based in Palo Alto, California, Globality, specializing in AI-driven sourcing and procurement, has recently completed a successful funding round. Through a combination of Series D-1 and Series D-2 preferred stock offerings, they secured $47 million. Existing preferred shareholders and new investors like Rollins Capital participated in the funding round. This brings Globality's total capital raised to an impressive $356 million. Established nearly a decade ago, Globality focuses on using AI technology to transform how large corporations handle their expenditures.

news.headline: KlariVis wins Inc.'s 2024 Power Partner Award for Artificial Intelligence & Data category, recognizing B2B excellence.
news.summary: KlariVis, a leader in enhancing banking data analytics, has been recognized by Inc. in the Artificial Intelligence & Data category of its Power Partner Awards. This award acknowledges B2B companies excelling in essential services across sectors such as marketing and financial services. KlariVis' innovation has secured its spot on this prestigious list, highlighting its impact and success in the industry. The Inc. Power Partner Awards celebrate top companies making significant contributions to various fields.

news.headline: Plus's SuperDriveTM AI-based Level 4 Autonomous Driving software wins 2024 Reuters Automotive D.R.I.V.E Innovation award.
news.summary: Based in Santa Clara, California, Plus is a prominent player in the autonomous driving software sector and has recently been recognized with the 2024 Reuters Automotive D.R.I.V.E. Honours. The award, presented in the Innovation category, lauds Plus for its cutting-edge Level 4 AI-driven autonomous driving software, SuperDriveTM. Judges were impressed by the company's forward-thinking approach, highlighting the software's potential impact and scalability. Describing SuperDrive as a groundbreaking solution for practical autonomous applications, they praised Plus for bringing this innovative technology to reality.

news.headline: SCIEX and Bioinformatics Solutions Inc. collaborate to launch PEAKS 12.5 software, compatible with ZenoTOF 7600+, for proteomic advancements.
news.summary: A partnership between SCIEX and Bioinformatics Solutions Inc. has led to the co-development of PEAKS 12.5, a cutting-edge software designed to work seamlessly with the ZenoTOF 7600+ system. The collaboration aims to enhance data processing and analysis capabilities in the field.

news.headline: Kerrigan Advisors facilitated sale of Cowboy Toyota to The CAR Group, making it their 4th Texas Toyota franchise in 18 months.
news.summary: In Dallas, Cowboy Toyota was recently sold to The CAR Group (also known as Norm Reeves) by Kerrigan Advisors, a prominent sell-side advisor for auto dealers across the country. The CAR Group is recognized as the 23rd largest dealership group in the United States according to Automotive News. This deal marks Kerrigan Advisors' fourth Texas-based Toyota franchise sale and their 18th overall Texas franchise sale since May 2023. Kerrigan Advisors has been instrumental in facilitating the successful sale of numerous major dealerships in the region.

news.headline: Xerox Holdings Corp to host webcast at 8am on Oct 29, 2024, to discuss 2024 Q3 results. Executives to review numbers.
news.summary: Xerox Holdings Corporation (NASDAQ: XRX) is set to discuss its 2024 third-quarter results through a live audio webcast scheduled for 8 a.m. ET on October 29th. A news release with the detailed information will precede the webcast at 6:30 a.m. ET on the same day. The event will involve key figures such as Steve Bandrowczak, the CEO of Xerox, and John Bruno, the President and COO of the company. This is an opportunity to delve into the financial performance of Xerox and gain insights into its quarterly outcomes.

news.headline: Alpha and Omega Semiconductor will exhibit specialized solutions for Auto, Industrial, Power Supplies, Renewable Energy, e-Mobility at electronica 2024.
Crossroads Treatment Centers receives Barrier Breaker Award at Savage Sisters Ball for commitment to reducing barriers in SUD care.
news.summary: In Greenville, South Carolina, Crossroads Treatment Centers recently received the Barrier Breaker Award at the Worth Saving Ball event hosted by Savage Sisters, a nonprofit from Philadelphia. This award acknowledges Crossroads' dedication to reducing obstacles to care and improving accessibility for individuals in need of substance use disorder (SUD) treatment and recovery services. Crossroads is renowned for its efforts in this area and their commitment was recognized at the event.

news.headline: Perfect Corp. launches The Beautiful AI Podcast, exploring AI beauty tech's impact on industry and beyond.
news.summary: A leading AI and AR beauty technology company, Perfect Corp. (NYSE: PERF), unveiled its new venture - The Beautiful AI Podcast. This series explores the impact of artificial intelligence on the beauty industry and beyond. The podcast showcases the latest advancements in AI through interviews with industry pioneers.

news.headline: FICO and Senator Mark Warner partner for financial literacy workshops in Virginia; events on October 29 and 30.
news.summary: In Norfolk and Portsmouth, Virginia, global analytics software leader FICO, along with U.S. Senator Mark Warner’s office, are collaborating to host a series of Score A Better Future™ credit education workshops. Scheduled for October 29 and October 30, these workshops are part of the “Virginia Financial Empowerment Series.” This initiative follows the success of the previous workshops in March and demonstrates the ongoing dedication of the partnership to promote financial literacy.

news.headline: Green Dot introduces Arc by Green Dot, offering embedded finance services to businesses for growth. #BaaS #Fintech
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Green Dot Corporation (NYSE: GDOT) has introduced Arc by Green Dot, a new offering comprising banking as a service (BaaS) that aims to enhance engagement and growth for businesses. With Arc, Green Dot integrates secure banking and money processing services into a unified platform, providing adaptable solutions that can enhance retention, value, and business expansion opportunities. This initiative is set to benefit companies across various sectors and industries, offering a modern and holistic approach to financial services.
